allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys; html=sys.stdin.read\(\); print\('HAS_CONTENT' if 'overview-text' in html or 'section-block' in html else 'NO_CONTENT'\); print\('HAS_HERO' if 'hero-image-wrap' in html else 'NO_HERO'\); print\('HAS_SPECS' if 'spec-value' in html else 'NO_SPECS'\); print\('NO_DATA_PAGE' if 'No Data Found' in html else 'DATA_PAGE'\)")
